jsonLd.title: RBI is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!
